accessToYourEntirePhotoLibrary: • Access to your entire photo library
aigeneratedSuggestions: AI-generated suggestions are provided for assistance only and must be reviewed by you before submission.
byUsing: By using the App, you agree to the practices described in this Privacy Policy.
cInformationWeDoNotCollect: C- Information We Do NOT Collect
collectedOnly: Collected only at the time you submit a sighting report to identify where the pet was seen.
createAndDisplayPetSightingReportsToOthe: • Create and display pet sighting reports to other users
dataProcessed: Data processed through this API is not used by us to train public AI models.
dependingOnYourStateOfResidenceYouMayHav: Depending on your state of residence, you may have rights to:
googleProcessesData: Google processes data in accordance with its applicable data protection and security commitments.
ifYouHaveQuestionsAbout: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at:
image: The image you choose to upload. We do not access or collect other photos from your device.
imagesMayBeTemporarilyProcessed: Images may be temporarily processed for AI analysis. Any temporary processing by service providers is governed by contractual safeguards.
improveTheFunctionalityAndReliabilityOfT: • Improve the functionality and reliability of the App
informationYouEnter: Information you enter into the report form (such as breed, color, time, and other relevant details).
intro: SpotAPaw (“we,” “our,” or “us”) respects your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, process, store, and protect your information when you use the SpotAPaw mobile application (the “App”).
ourAppIsNotDirectedToChildrenUnder13: Our app is not directed to children under 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13. If we learn that we have collected personal information from a child under 13, we will delete it.
privateMessagesOrChatHistory: • Private messages or chat history (chat functionality has been removed)
requestAccessToPersonalInformationWeHold: • Request access to personal information we hold about you
storedAsPartOfTheSightingReport: Stored as part of the sighting report.
storedAsPartOfTheSightingReport2: Stored as part of the sighting report.
storedUntilMarkedResolvedOrDeemedNoLonge: Stored until marked resolved, or deemed no longer relevant.
theAppRequestsTheFollowingPermissions: The App requests the following permissions:
thisProcessing: This processing is used solely to generate suggested pet description details to assist you in completing your sighting report.
toExerciseTheseRightsContactUsAtTheEmail: To exercise these rights, contact us at the email below.
uploadedPhotosMayBeTrans: Uploaded photos may be transmitted securely to Google for processing.
usedOnlyAtTheTimeYouCreateASightingRepor: Used only at the time you create a sighting report.
usedOnlyWhenYouChooseToUpload: Used only when you choose to upload or capture a photo for a sighting report.
useYourDataForTargetedAdvertising: Use your data for targeted advertising
weCollectOnly: We collect only the information necessary to operate the App.
weDoNotCollectOrStore: We do not collect or store:
weDoNotSellOrLicenseYourPhotosToThirdPar: We do not sell or license your photos to third parties.
weDoNotShareYourPersonal: We do not share your personal data with unrelated third parties. We do not share your data with advertisers.
weMayDiscloseInformation: We may disclose information: To comply with legal obligations To protect the rights, safety, or property of SpotAPaw or others.
weMayRetainLimitedInformation: We may retain limited information as required to comply with legal obligations or resolve disputes.
weMayUpdateThisPrivacyPolicy: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of significant changes by updating the 'Effective Date' at the top of this page.
weRetainDataOnlyAsLongAsNecessaryToOpera: We retain data only as long as necessary to operate the App.
weTakeReasonableMeasures: We take reasonable measures to protect your data from unauthorized access, alteration, or disclosure. However, no method of transmission or storage is completely secure.
weUseThePaidCommercialApiVersionOfGoogle: We use the paid commercial API version of Google Gemini.
whenYouSubmit: When you submit a sighting report, we collect:
whenYouUpload: When you upload a photo, the image is analyzed using artificial intelligence technology provided by Google Gemini (a service operated by Google).
withOtherAppUsers: With Other App Users: Pet sighting information (photo, description, date and time, and location) is visible within the App to help reunite pets with owners.
withServiceProviders: With Service Providers: We may share limited information with trusted third-party service providers who help us operate the App, such as cloud hosting providers and artificial intelligence processing providers (including Google for Gemini AI services). These providers process data solely on our behalf and in accordance with contractual data protection obligations.
youMayManageThesePermissions: You may manage these permissions in the App or your device settings at any time.
